description_long: This rifle features a robust, industrial design with a large cylindrical barrel and a prominent rotary drum mechanism near the center, suggesting a high-capacity or multi-barrel firing system. The main body is finished in a matte olive green with yellow hazard stripes and red accents, giving it a tactical, urban warfare appearance. The grip is ergonomic and black, with a visible trigger guard and a yellow gear-like detail, while a red canister or battery is mounted beneath the central drum, possibly for power or ammunition. Protective metal rails encircle the drum, likely for safety or structural reinforcement. The muzzle is slightly flared, and the rear section is compact, lacking a traditional rifle stock, instead featuring a pistol grip configuration. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, designed for durability and heavy use in urban environments.
description: A heavy, industrial-style rifle with a large rotary drum, olive green and black finish, yellow hazard markings, and a red canister beneath the central mechanism. It features a pistol grip and protective metal rails, giving it a tactical, urban look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, the rotary drum, red canister, hazard stripes, and ergonomic pistol grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular muzzle, protective rails, and the alignment of the grip and drum.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the drum, canister, and grip, with hazard stripes and mechanical details visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the drum, grip, and the overall compact rear profile.
